recipes.name: Classic Cheeseburger
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Divide ground beef into 4 equal patties. Season both sides with salt and black pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat.
Cook patties for 3–4 minutes per side.
Add cheddar cheese during the last minute and cover to melt.
Toast buns lightly in the same pan or separate pan.
Assemble burgers with lettuce, tomato, onion, pickles, ketchup, and mustard.
Serve immediately.
chef_upgrade: Toast buns with butter for better flavor.
Add caramelized onions (cook onions slowly for 15 minutes).
Use a mix of beef (80/20) for juicier burgers.

recipes.name: Garlic Chicken Rice Bowl
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add chicken, season with salt and pepper, and cook 6–7 minutes until done.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add broccoli and cook for 3–4 minutes.
Stir in soy sauce and butter.
Serve chicken and vegetables over rice.
Top with green onions.
chef_upgrade: Marinate chicken in soy sauce and garlic for 30 minutes before cooking.
Add sesame oil for deeper flavor.
Top with sesame seeds or chili oil.

recipes.name: Sheet Pan Chicken and Vegetables
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Preheat oven to 425°F.
Place chicken, potatoes, carrots, and broccoli on a sheet pan.
Drizzle with olive oil and add garlic, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Toss everything to coat evenly.
Spread into a single layer.
Roast for 30–35 minutes until chicken is cooked through and vegetables are tender.
Serve hot.
chef_upgrade: Use bone-in chicken for more flavor.
Add fresh herbs like rosemary or thyme.
Preheat sheet pan before adding food for crispier texture.

recipes.name: Chicken Tacos
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic and cook 2–3 minutes.
Add chicken, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper.
Cook for 8–10 minutes until chicken is done.
Warm tortillas in a separate pan.
Fill tortillas with chicken mixture.
Top with cheese, cilantro, and lime juice.
Serve immediately.
chef_upgrade: Char tortillas directly over flame for flavor.
Use a squeeze of lime crema (sour cream + lime).

recipes.name: Garlic Butter Salmon
ingredients_full: salt and black pepper to taste
instructions: Season salmon with salt and black pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Cook salmon skin-side down for 4–5 minutes.
Flip and cook another 3–4 minutes.
Add butter and garlic, spoon over salmon.
Add lemon slices and cook 1 more minute.
Garnish with parsley and serve.
chef_upgrade: Add white wine to the pan sauce.
